subcodes.first_line: O well-wisher of the world of humanity! Praised be God that thine intention was good, that thou didst acquire knowledge and learning
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خیرخواه عالم انسانی الحمد لله که نیت خیری داشتی و تحصیل معارف نمودی و آرزو
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love and unity, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
